findings.message: Adding the required (non-null) argument `description: str` to the existing `create_item` mutation is a breaking schema change. Existing clients that call `create_item(name: "...")` without `description` will now fail GraphQL validation, with no compatible migration path.
findings.suggestion: Make the new argument optional with a default so the change stays backwards-compatible, e.g. `description: str | None = None` (or `description: Optional[str] = strawberry.UNSET`), and have the resolver actually forward it: `repository.create_item(session, name, description)`.
